data.name: Hentai Breeding Simulator
data.detailed_description:
You just opened your brand new fertility clinic and it is up to you to guide your clients on their way towards impregnation. Manage the girls, have consultations with them and don't forget about the breeding sessions! Everything to make them pregnant.

This simulation game consists of multiple mini-games including typing game, rhythm game and reflexes game. You will also need to manage the girls and your clinic in order to get them all pregnant! It is a simple, chill and funny game which should entertain you enough for one or two evenings.

Typing game will need you to type words without mistakes and in time, rhythm game will need you to click in certain points in time and reflexes game will need you to quickly identify successive pattern of numbers.



Game Mechanics:
  • Breed beautiful hentai girls with your very fertile semen!
  • Unlock new cameras to see them in different angles and discover new clients
  • Unlock animations for them for the breeding process
  • Multiple mini-games for fun experience
  • 5 girls + one bonus mystery girl

Capsule art by: Kalilair

data.short_description: Do everything in your power to make them pregnant!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 64bit
  • 處理器: Quad-core Intel or AMD, 2.5 GHz or faster
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
